mapper.insert: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcunit */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_ICUT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , #{closdate} AS CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUTKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , I.ICKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY I.ICKEY ) T LEFT JOIN TT_MST_ICUT IU ON T.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND T.ICKEY = IU.ICUTKEY ) TT WHERE SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIctxtype */ UPDATE TT_MST_ICUTXTYPE M SET ( ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) = ( SELECT U.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , U.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , U.LENGTH /*길이*/ , U.WIDTH /*너비*/ , U.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , U.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , U.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , U.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , U.VOL /*부피*/ , U.VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE U WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND U.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.ICKEY = U.ICUTKEY ) AND U.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND U.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND U.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.ICKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} )
mapper.insert: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIctxtype */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_ICUTXTYPE ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT TT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , TT.ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , TT.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , TT.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , TT.LENGTH /*길이*/ , TT.WIDTH /*너비*/ , TT.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , TT.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , TT.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TT.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , TT.VOLUME /*부피*/ , TT.VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , T.ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , T.ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , T.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , T.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , T.LENGTH /*길이*/ , T.WIDTH /*너비*/ , T.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , T.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , T.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , T.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , T.VOL /*부피*/ , T.VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE T ON IU.ICKEY = T.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = T.ICUNITTYPE AND T.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TT_MST_ICUTXTYPE M ON T.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND T.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'

/* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIctxtypexct */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT TT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUTKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , TT.ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , TT.CTKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , T.ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , T.ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , CT.CTKEY , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE T ON IU.ICKEY = T.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = T.ICUNITTYPE AND T.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TT_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT M ON T.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND T.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateItems */ UPDATE TT_MST_IC UC SET ( UC.ICNAME /*물품명*/ , UC.ICGRKEY /*카테고리*/ , UC.ICGRTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , UC.ICUTKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , UC.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , UC.SPEC /*규격*/ , UC.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , UC.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , UC.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , UC.VOLUME /*부피*/ , UC.WEIGHT /*무게*/ , UC.SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부*/ , UC.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , UC.UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , UC.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , UC.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , UC.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UC.UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , UC.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , UC.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , UC.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , UC.BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , UC.BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , UC.BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , UC.BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , UC.BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ ) = ( SELECT M.ICNM /*물품명*/ , M.ICGRPKEY /*카테고리*/ , M.ICGRPTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , M.ICUNITKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , M.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , M.SPEC /*규격*/ , M.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , M.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , M.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , M.VOL /*부피*/ , M.WEIGHT /*무게*/ , M.EXPCKYN /*유통기한체크여부*/ , M.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , M.UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , M.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , M.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , M.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , M.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , M.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , M.BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , M.BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , M.BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , M.BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , M.BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC M ON I.ICKEY = M.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND M.ICKEY = UC.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = UC.OWKEY ) WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC T1 WHERE T1.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T1.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND T1.ICKEY = UC.ICKEY )
mapper.insert: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertItems */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_IC ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , ICKEY /*물품코드*/ , ICNAME /*물품명*/ , ICGRKEY /*카테고리*/ , ICGRTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , ICUTKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , SPEC /*규격*/ , WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , WEIGHT /*무게*/ , BRANDCODE /*브랜드코드*/ , SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부*/ , SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , SHELFLIFECODETYPE /*유통기한체크유형*/ , UDF1 /*사용자정의필드1*/ , UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , UDF3 /*사용자정의필드3*/ , UDF4 /*사용자정의필드4*/ , UDF5 /*사용자정의필드5*/ , SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼 입력 유형*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료일시*/ , ACKEY /*거래처코드*/ , REGDATE /*변경일자*/ , TAXYN /*과세구분*/ , DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , ORDSTOPDATE /*센터에서 거래처 시 발주정지예정일자*/ , RELEASEDAYS /*출고가능일수*/ , LO_NON_STOCK_TYPE /*무재고상품구분*/ , DISPSHELFKEY /*진열대코드*/ , ACCSTOCKTYPE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , ACCSTOCKDATE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , MINORDQTY /*배수상한상품최소수량*/ , MAXORDQTY /*배수상한상품최대수량*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입일자*/ , FOODYN /*식품비식품여부*/ , CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , STC_APPLY_GRADE_CD /*재고등급코드*/ , SHELFDAY /*보관수명(DAY)*/ , WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ ) SELECT M.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , M.ICKEY /*물품코드*/ , M.ICNM /*물품명*/ , M.ICGRPKEY /*카테고리*/ , M.ICGRPTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , M.ICUNITKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , M.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , M.SPEC /*규격*/ , M.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , M.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , M.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , M.VOL /*부피*/ , M.WEIGHT /*무게*/ , M.BRANDCD /*브랜드코드*/ , M.EXPCKYN /*유통기한체크여부*/ , M.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , M.EXPCKTYPE /*유통기한체크유형*/ , M.UDF1 /*사용자정의필드1*/ , M.UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , M.UDF3 /*사용자정의필드3*/ , M.UDF4 /*사용자정의필드4*/ , M.UDF5 /*사용자정의필드5*/ , M.SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼 입력 유형*/ , M.CLOSDATE /*종료일시*/ , M.ACKEY /*거래처코드*/ , M.REGDATE /*변경일자*/ , M.TAXYN /*과세구분*/ , M.DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , M.BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , M.BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , M.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , M.RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , M.ORDSTOPDATE /*센터에서 거래처 시 발주정지예정일자*/ , M.OBDAYS /*출고가능일수*/ , M.LONONSTOCKTYPE /*무재고상품구분*/ , M.DISPSHELFKEY /*진열대코드*/ , M.STGNIVTYPE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , M.STGNIVDATE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , M.RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , M.RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , M.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , M.MINORDQTY /*배수상한상품최소수량*/ , M.MAXORDQTY /*배수상한상품최대수량*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , M.ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입일자*/ , M.FOODYN /*식품비식품여부*/ , M.CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , M.STCAPPLYGRADECD /*재고등급코드*/ , M.SHELFDAY /*보관수명(DAY)*/ , M.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , M.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , M.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , M.BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , M.BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , M.BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , M.BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , M.BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC M ON I.ICKEY = M.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TT_MST_IC A ON M.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = A.OWKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.ICKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIcxct */ UPDATE TT_MST_ICXCT UCT SET ( UCT.LOGGRPCD , UCT.ICGRKEY , UCT.UPDATEDATE , UCT.UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT IC.LOGGRPCD , IC.ICGRPKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IC.ICKEY = UCT.ICKEY AND IC.CTKEY = UCT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = UCT.OWKEY ) WHERE UCT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC T1 JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT T2 ON T1.ICKEY = T2.ICKEY AND T2.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE T1.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T1.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND T2.ICKEY = UCT.ICKEY AND T2.CTKEY = UCT.CTKEY AND T2.OWKEY = UCT.OWKEY )
mapper.insert: /* tms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcxct */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_ICXCT ( OWKEY , ICKEY , CTKEY , LOGGRPCD , VOLTYPE , NEWYN , ORDTYPE , ICGRKEY , DCKEY , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT IC.OWKEY , IC.ICKEY , IC.CTKEY , IC.LOGGRPCD , '0' AS VOLTYPE , 'Y' AS NEWYN , '0' AS ORDTYPE , IC.ICGRPKEY , '1' AS DCKEY , 'N' AS DELYN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TT_MST_ICXCT A ON IC.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IC.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = A.OWKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.ICKEY IS NULL
